title: Hooks System for CLI Event Interception
description: Added a Claude Code-compatible hooks system that allows external handlers (shell commands, HTTP endpoints) to intercept and respond to CLI events. Supports 16 event types with regex-based matching, typed inputs/outputs, sync/async execution, and multi-source config merging.

title: Cache Hit Rate Calculation Fix
description: Fixed duplicate prompt_cache_metrics emission and corrected cache_hit_rate calculation denominator. Also fixed Vercel AI SDK stream converter to properly emit tool call id/name from tool-input-start.

title: CLI Release v1.5.45
description: Version 1.5.45 release built and published from the main branch, including the new hooks system and cache metrics fixes.

title: Overeager Prompts for GPT Models
description: Added overeager: true setting to gpt-5.2-codex model variants and gpt-4-turbo. Enhanced overeager prompt functionality in ask_prompts.py for more proactive AI responses.

title: CLI Release v1.5.44
description: Version 1.5.44 release built and published from the main branch.

title: New /ok Command
description: Added /ok command as an alias for /code Ok command, accepting optional arguments. The command streamlines workflow confirmation in Aider's coding assistant interface.
